levels.title: Navigate the FHS
levels.objective: Change your directory to /etc and list its contents.

levels.title: Text Processing: Grep
levels.objective: Search for the word 'root' inside the /etc/passwd file.
levels.validate: function(state) { return state.history && state.history.some(c => c.includes('grep root /etc/passwd')); }

levels.title: Process Management
levels.objective: A rogue process is running. View all processes to find it.

levels.title: Change Permissions
levels.objective: Make the file 'script.sh' executable for everyone.
levels.validate: function(state) { return state.history && state.history.some(c => c.includes('chmod') && c.includes('script.sh')); }

levels.title: Check IP Address
levels.objective: Find the IP address of your machine using the modern command.

levels.title: Start SSH Service
levels.objective: Start the SSH service using systemctl.
levels.validate: function(state) { return state.history && state.history.includes('systemctl start ssh'); }

levels.title: Find SUID Binaries
levels.objective: Search the entire filesystem for files with the SUID bit set, hiding errors.
levels.validate: function(state) { return state.history && state.history.some(c => c.includes('find') && c.includes('-perm -4000')); }

levels.title: Check Sudo Privileges
levels.objective: Check what commands you are allowed to run as root.
